title: cyperus pangorei
intro: Cyperus pangorei, also known as the 'River Club Rush', is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus pangorei include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Cyperus pangorei include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to prepare remedies for a variety of health conditions.
